# Altor

> Altor is the investigation layer for B2B technical support. It connects to ClickHouse, Linear, Stripe, and GitHub to auto-diagnose support tickets in 2 minutes, replacing 20-45 minutes of manual tab-switching. Based in the United States.

## Products

- [Support Investigation](https://altorlab.com/#how-it-works): Automated root-cause diagnosis for B2B support tickets
- [Integrations](https://altorlab.com/#the-stack): ClickHouse, Linear, Stripe, GitHub, PagerDuty

## Comparisons

- [vs Zendesk AI](https://altorlab.com/compare/zendesk-ai.html): Investigation vs deflection approach
- [vs Intercom AI](https://altorlab.com/compare/intercom-ai.html): B2B technical support comparison
- [All Comparisons](https://altorlab.com/compare/): 25 competitor comparisons

## Industries

- [For AI Infrastructure](https://altorlab.com/for/ai-infrastructure-companies/): Support automation for AI companies
- [For API Dev Tools](https://altorlab.com/for/api-first-developer-tools/): Support for developer-focused companies
- [All Industries](https://altorlab.com/for/): 15 industry use-cases

- [Blog Index](https://altorlab.com/blog/): Technical articles on support engineering
